title: PJSR Extended API Schema
description: Extended API definitions from PixInsight GitLab repositories - supplements pjsr-core.json

StarDetector.description: Star detection engine for finding stars in images

structureLayers.description: Number of wavelet layers for structure detection

applyHotPixelFilterToDetectionImage.description: Apply hot pixel filter to detection image

hotPixelFilter.description: Remove hot pixels via median filtering

Star.constructor: Star(pos, flux, bkg, rect, size, nmax)

NumericEdit.description: Label/edit control compound for numeric parameter modification

NumericControl.description: Extended compound control with slider functionality

sliderValueToControl.description: Convert slider position to control value

controlValueToSlider.description: Convert control value to slider position

ColorComboBox.description: CSS3 color selection combo box with 143 colors

SimpleColorDialog.description: Modal dialog for ARGB color selection with RGB/Alpha sliders

FontControl.description: Font properties control with face, size, bold, italic

DateTimeEditor.description: Date and optional time input control

ImageMetadata.description: Manages astrometric solutions and WCS metadata for images

WCSKeywords.description: Reads and parses WCS metadata from FITS headers

crval1.description: Celestial coordinate at reference pixel (RA in degrees)

crval2.description: Celestial coordinate at reference pixel (Dec in degrees)

FromString.description: Parse DMS string (HMS for hours, DMS for degrees)

ReferSpline.constructor: ReferSpline(P1, P2, rbfType, maxSplinePoints, order, smoothing, simplify, rejectFraction, incremental)

ObjectWithSettings.description: Base class for objects that persist settings

CatalogRecord.description: Represents an individual catalog object entry

Catalog.description: Base class for astronomical catalog implementations

Load.description: Load catalog objects for image field

VizierCatalog.description: Online catalog access via VizieR service

VizierCache.description: Caching mechanism for VizieR query results

supportedCatalogs.description: Full list of 26 supported astronomical catalogs

rgbaColor.signature: Color.rgbaColor(r, g, b, a?: Number): Number

rgbaColorF.signature: Color.rgbaColorF(r, g, b, a?: Number): Number

MultipleLinearRegression.description: Multiple linear regression for coordinate transformations

dataTypes.description: Data type constants for File I/O (pjsr/DataType.jsh)

PenStyle_DashDotDot.description: Dashes followed by pairs of dots

PenCap_Flat.description: Square caps not reaching line end points

PenCap_Square.description: Square caps extending beyond end points

PenCap_Round.description: Round caps centered at line end points

UndoFlag_DefaultMode.description: Save pixel data, astrometric solution and previews

PropertyAttribute_Storable.description: Can be stored in image files

extendedImageWindowMethods.description: Additional ImageWindow methods from PCL headers

HasAstrometricSolution.description: Check if image has astrometric solution

Sesame.returns: Object identifiers, equatorial positions, and alternate names

includeFiles.description: Standard PJSR include files and their purposes

constants.description: Data type constants for File I/O

ui.description: Sizer alignment constants and HorizontalSizer/VerticalSizer classes
Color selection combo box with 143 CSS3 colors

graphics.description: Brush fill styles (15 types including gradients)
Graphics composition operators (24 Porter-Duff and blend modes)
Font family constants (7 families with aliases)
